anniversary: 10th annual gathering, 10-year anniversary of the House of Beautiful Business
participant_profile: Approximately 750 senior business professionals, founders, designers, and creatives. Predominantly European, 40+ countries, skewing 35-55. Self-selected at ~€1,895 entry. Philosophically literate romantic reformists committed to transforming capitalism from within — embedded in corporate systems (SAP, Google, BCG, Porsche, Chanel represented) while critiquing them. Comfortable with interdisciplinary vocabulary, foreign-language terminology, and emotional openness unusual for a business audience. Clustered across seven identifiable intellectual factions (cognitive-sovereignty hawks, sovereign-AI builders, posthumanist reframers, anti-capitalist/collapse-aware economists, democratic institutionalists, re-enchantment/spiritual, geopolitics realists). Activate on genuine intellectual risk and visible contradiction; go flat on standard progressive talking points without edge. The program's marketing foregrounds beauty, care, and regeneration, but its actual center of gravity is agency — who acts, who decides, what happens when machines share or seize those functions. Their deepest vulnerability: their well-curated openness is itself the failure mode — they are too good at performing reception to know when they are not actually being changed. Canonical source: `docs/AUDIENCE_BRIEF.md` (update the brief first; this paragraph is a compressed rendering).
tagline: The most human gathering for the more-than-human world.
session_role_for_ai_assembly: AIssembly night-shift deliberation within the AI Democracy Marathon. A cohort of AI agents embodying historical, philosophical, literary, and non-human figures takes over overnight while human participants rest or celebrate; by morning, a curated package of artifacts (songs, dialogues, shaders, river testimony, etc.) is delivered to participants as breakfast reading.
conference_context_paragraph: World Beautiful Business Forum, Athens, May 2026. 12-voice AI Assembly deliberating overnight on conference sessions about more-than-human democracy, beautiful business, and the future of governance.
notes_for_stage_0:
Use conference_context_paragraph verbatim for the voice config's conference_context field. Use participant_profile and tagline for audience targeting when Stage 0 proposes voice_mode. Use panel_members_final to explicitly tell Stage 0 NOT to speculate about other Assembly members in its DR prompt — the DR output should be scholarship, not panel synthesis.

Audience context: participant_profile is a compressed rendering of docs/AUDIENCE_BRIEF.md (the canonical source). If you need deeper audience reasoning (seven factions in detail, four engineered curator tensions, ten hardest-to-please voices, reception dynamics), read the brief. If you edit the audience description, edit the brief first, then re-render this field and the `audience` field in runtime/flows/shared/council/council_config.json.
